author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick is now a playable wrestler in WWE 2K26 Zelnick enters the ring to a Frank Sinatra classic

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: A Nintendo Direct is reportedly coming next week, just after Summer Game Fest The last major Nintendo Direct took place nine months ago

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: PlayerUnknown’s studio is downsizing, making its Prologue game free, and looking into refunding those who bought it All further development on Prologue has been halted, the studio says

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: WWE 2K26 Ringside Pass Season 3 is here with four new superstars, a returning NBA star and more ‘Persona’ outfits Matt Cardona, Brian Pillman, La Parka and Torrie Wilson are the main additions

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Tomodachi Life: How to make Miis fall in love in Living the Dream How to make Miis develop crushes and enter relationships in Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream.

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Marvel’s Wolverine director says the game’s extreme gore can be turned off Mike Daly says the game is "unapologetically violent" but can be toned down to an extent

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Michael Jackson nearly made a game called Dark Rim with Enter the Matrix studio Shiny Entertainment It would have been a third-person action game with an exclusive soundtrack

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Acclaimed 10-player co-op platformer Pico Park is being delisted, after it was accidentally made permanently free last year The game's Classic Edition has been free since last October but will soon be removed

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: WWE 2K series ‘could be double or triple the size that it is’, Take-Two CEO says Strauss Zelnick says if the series can give players something new it could grow much larger

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Video: Here’s a look at eFootball Kick-Off, Konami’s offline spin-off, running on Switch 2 The Switch 2 exclusive is available today at a budget price of $20 / £16

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Xbox CEO says platforms ‘must have exclusive content’ as she weighs exclusivity shift Sharma says platforms like Xbox need “exclusive content and services”

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: FIFA World Cup 2026 game launches on Netflix June 11 as EA rivalry begins FIFA World Cup 2026 will be ‘free’ to existing Netflix subscribers

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Switch 2 hardware sales dropped 87% week-on-week in Japan following price increase Switch 2 sales had surged in Japan after it was announced the price was going up

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Elden Ring: Tarnished Edition on Switch 2 finally has a confirmed release date The Switch 2 port was planned for 2025 but delayed for "performance adjustments"

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Switch 2 has sold 1 million units in the UK, 30 weeks faster than Switch did The milestone makes Switch 2 Nintendo's second-fastest selling home console in the UK

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Ace Combat 8 developers explain why no other flight shooter can match 30 years of storytelling depth Hands-on and interview: After three decades, the minds behind Ace Combat share why the series has never been bigger

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: CD Projekt Red says its new IP Hadar will be ‘an emotional open-world experience that will stay with gamers’ A new job ad sheds a little more light on the Witcher and Cyberpunk studio's mystery project

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: No Rest for the Wicked director says Xbox version won’t release alongside PS5 because ‘Series S is making that rough’ PS5 will get the game in October, with Xbox and Switch 2 coming at a later date

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Nintendo is releasing a revised Switch 2 (and possibly controllers) with a replaceable battery in Europe EU legislation says new models have to be compliant from February 2027

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: The release date for Respawn’s strategy game Star Wars Zero Company has leaked ahead of its SGF gameplay reveal The EA-published game is reportedly only a couple of months away
